name: Goldman Sachs Group Inc Depositary Shs Repstg 1/1000th Pfd Ser J Fixed to Fltg Rate
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc Depositary Shs Repstg 1/1000th Pfd Ser J Fixed to Fltg Rate represents a fractional ownership in a series of preferred stock issued by Goldman Sachs. These preferred shares have a dividend rate that changes from fixed to floating after a specified date. As a depositary share, it simplifies trading and ownership of the underlying preferred stock.
